name: Blog / Article Card
description: 现代博客文章卡片，带封面图、分类标签、阅读时间，参考 material-tailwind blog card，支持深浅色和RTL

template.html:
{{category}}
{{read_time}} {{date}}

{{name}}

{{description}}

{{author}}

{{role}}

name.default: How to Build Better Web Experiences

description.default: Discover the latest techniques and best practices for creating fast, accessible, and visually stunning web applications.
